description: Search, compare, price-watch, model-enrich, and project-track homeowner-visible renovation selections across 33 active sources plus 5 tracked stubs. Reno Goat adds category-routed product search and compound model intelligence across appliances, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, flooring, hardware, materials, furniture, and decor.

tools.name: brands_ferguson-brands
tools.description: List brands available at Ferguson by searching with a brand filter. Returns brand facets from search results. Optional: source (default: ferguson), cross-ref.

params.name: cross-ref
params.description: Brand name to cross-reference across all sources. Returns availability and price ranges at each retailer carrying this brand.

tools.name: brands_rejuvenation-brands
tools.description: List brands available at Rejuvenation via Constructor.io brand facets. Optional: key (default: key_9BhS51IOFNhJejk4), source (default: rejuvenation), cross-ref. Returns the BrandListResult.

params.name: cross-ref
params.description: Brand name to cross-reference across sources.

tools.name: brands_westelm-brands
tools.description: List brands available at West Elm via Constructor.io brand facets. Optional: key (default: key_SQBuGmXjiXmP0UNI), source (default: west-elm), cross-ref. Returns the BrandListResult.

params.name: cross-ref
params.description: Brand name to cross-reference across sources.

tools.name: categories_rejuvenation-categories
tools.description: Browse the Rejuvenation product category tree. Returns subcategories, product counts, and navigation paths. Required: category. Optional: source (default: rejuvenation).

params.name: category
params.description: Category slug to browse (e.g. lighting, hardware, bath). Omit for top-level category listing.

params.name: source
params.description: Source to browse categories for (currently Rejuvenation only).

tools.name: compare_multi-product-compare
tools.description: Compare 2+ products side-by-side. Each URL is resolved to its source, fetched in parallel, and rendered in a comparison table. Works across different sources. Required: urls. Returns the CompareResult.

params.name: urls
params.description: Space-separated product URLs to compare (2 or more). Each URL is resolved to its source automatically.

tools.name: deals_westelm-deals
tools.description: Check eligible promotions for a West Elm product or category. Returns active sales, discount percentages, and promo codes. Required: category. Optional: price, source (default: west-elm).

params.name: category
params.description: Product or category slug to check promotions for.

params.name: price
params.description: Product price to check promotion eligibility against.

params.name: source
params.description: Source to check deals for (currently West Elm only).

tools.name: delivery_rejuvenation-delivery
tools.description: Check delivery availability and options from Rejuvenation by postal code. Required: zip, product_url. Returns the DeliveryInfoResult.

params.name: zip
params.description: Postal code to check delivery for.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Product URL to check delivery availability for.

tools.name: delivery_westelm-delivery
tools.description: Check delivery availability and options from West Elm by postal code. Required: zip, product_url. Returns the DeliveryInfoResult.

params.name: zip
params.description: Postal code to check delivery for.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Product URL to check delivery availability for.

tools.name: find-related_article-related
tools.description: Find cross-sell/related products from Article via APQ CROSS_SELL query. Returns complementary items for the given product. Required: product_url. Optional: extensions.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Article product URL to find related products for.

tools.name: find-similar_article-similar
tools.description: Find similar products from Article via APQ SIMILAR_PRODUCTS query. Returns visually and categorically similar items. Required: product_url. Optional: extensions.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Article product URL to find similar products for.

tools.name: product_article-product
tools.description: Get full product details from Article via APQ PRODUCT query. Returns 50+ fields including specs, reviews summary, delivery estimates, and customization options. Required: url. Optional: extensions, images (default: false), spec-sheet (default: false).

params.name: url
params.description: Article product URL or product handle.

tools.name: product_ferguson-product
tools.description: Get full product details from Ferguson via GraphQL ProductDetail query. Required: url. Optional: images (default: false), spec-sheet (default: false). Returns the new FergusonProductDetail.

params.name: url
params.description: Ferguson product URL or product slug.

params.name: spec-sheet
params.description: Extract and normalize product specifications into a structured sheet.

tools.name: product_rejuvenation-product
tools.description: Get full product details from Rejuvenation. Required: url, slug. Optional: images (default: false), spec-sheet (default: false). Returns the RejuvenationProductDetail.

params.name: url
params.description: Rejuvenation product URL or product slug.

tools.name: product_shopify-product
tools.description: Get full product details from a Shopify DTC store via Storefront API. Resolves store from URL. Required: url. Optional: handle, store, images (default: false) (plus 1 more). Returns the new ShopifyProductDetail.

params.name: url
params.description: Shopify product URL (store resolved from domain).

params.name: handle
params.description: Product handle (alternative to URL if store is also specified).

params.name: store
params.description: Shopify store domain (required if using handle instead of URL).

params.name: images
params.description: Include full image gallery with variant images.

tools.name: product_westelm-product
tools.description: Get full product details from West Elm. Required: url, slug. Optional: images (default: false), spec-sheet (default: false). Returns the WestElmProductDetail.

params.name: url
params.description: West Elm product URL or product slug.

params.name: images
params.description: Include full image gallery and swatch URLs.

tools.name: product-search_article-search
tools.description: Search products via Article APQ GraphQL. Uses SEARCH_PRODUCTS persisted query hash. Returns paginated product results with pricing and ratings. Required: query. Optional: extensions, variables, per-page (default: 20) (plus 1 more).

params.name: extensions
params.description: APQ extensions JSON containing the persisted query hash. Auto-generated: {'persistedQuery':{'version':1,'sha256Hash':'<SEARCH_PRODUCTS_HASH>'}}.

params.name: variables
params.description: GraphQL variables JSON. Auto-generated from flags: {'query':'...','pageSize':N,'page':N}.

tools.name: product-search_ferguson-search
tools.description: Search products via Ferguson GraphQL. Returns ProductSearchResult (count + products) or SearchRedirect. Primary source for foundational fixtures and appliances. Required: query. Optional: per-page (default: 20), offset (default: 0), sort (default: relevance).

tools.name: product-search_rejuvenation-search
tools.description: Search products via Rejuvenation Constructor.io API. Same API shape as West Elm with different key. Primary source for foundational hardware and decor. Required: query. Optional: key (default: key_9BhS51IOFNhJejk4), per-page (default: 20), page (default: 1) (plus 4 more). Returns the ConstructorSearchResult.

tools.name: product-search_shopify-search
tools.description: Search products across Shopify DTC stores via Storefront API GraphQL. Fans out to all configured stores (Schoolhouse, Blu Dot, Gus Modern, Floyd, Lulu & Georgia). Required: query. Optional: per-page (default: 20), store. Returns the new ShopifySearchResult.

params.name: per-page
params.description: Number of results per page per store.

params.name: store
params.description: Restrict to a specific Shopify store domain (e.g. schoolhouseelectric, floyd-home). Omit to fan out to all stores.

tools.name: product-search_westelm-search
tools.description: Search products via West Elm Constructor.io API. Returns faceted results with product data, prices, and images. Required: query. Optional: key (default: key_SQBuGmXjiXmP0UNI), per-page (default: 20), page (default: 1) (plus 6 more).

params.name: facet
params.description: Facet filter expression. Format: facet_name=value (e.g. 'Product Type=Vanities', 'Material=Wood', 'Color=White').

tools.name: reviews_article-reviews
tools.description: Get product reviews from Article via APQ getProductReviewsByProductId query. Includes ratings, review text, and UGC media. Required: product_url. Optional: extensions, aggregate (default: false). Returns the ArticleReviewsResult.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Article product URL to fetch reviews for.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: When true, cross-source review aggregation is performed. Finds the same product at other retailers by title/brand match and merges reviews.

tools.name: reviews_ferguson-reviews
tools.description: Get product reviews from Ferguson via the ProductDetail GraphQL query (reviews are embedded in product detail response). Required: product_url. Optional: aggregate (default: false). Returns the new FergusonReviewsResult.

params.name: product_url
params.description: Ferguson product URL to fetch reviews for.

params.name: aggregate
params.description: When true, cross-source review aggregation is performed.

tools.name: stores_rejuvenation-stores
tools.description: Find Rejuvenation stores near a location. Required: zip. Optional: brands (default: RJ), lat, lng (plus 1 more). Returns the StoreLocatorResult.

params.name: zip
params.description: ZIP code or postal code to search near.

tools.name: stores_westelm-stores
tools.description: Find West Elm stores near a location. Required: zip. Optional: brands (default: WE), lat, lng (plus 1 more). Returns the StoreLocatorResult.

params.name: zip
params.description: ZIP code or postal code to search near.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude for proximity search (alternative to ZIP).

tools.name: suggest_rejuvenation-suggest
tools.description: Autocomplete suggestions from Rejuvenation via Constructor.io. Required: query. Optional: key (default: key_9BhS51IOFNhJejk4), num-products (default: 0), num-suggestions (default: 5) (plus 1 more). Returns the ConstructorAutocompleteResult.

params.name: num-products
params.description: Number of product results to include.

params.name: num-suggestions
params.description: Number of search suggestions to return.

tools.name: suggest_westelm-suggest
tools.description: Autocomplete suggestions from West Elm via Constructor.io. Required: query. Optional: key (default: key_SQBuGmXjiXmP0UNI), num-products (default: 0), num-suggestions (default: 5) (plus 1 more). Returns the ConstructorAutocompleteResult.

params.name: num-products
params.description: Number of product results to include alongside suggestions.

params.name: num-suggestions
params.description: Number of search suggestions to return.
